source: BTD Mod Helper game data export

upgrades.name: Hard Thorns
upgrades.description: Hard thorns can pop 2 Bloons each and pop any Bloon type.

upgrades.name: Heart of Thunder
upgrades.description: Unleashes regular blasts of forked lightning that arc from Bloon to Bloon.

upgrades.name: Druid of the Storm
upgrades.description: Gusts of wind blow Bloons off the track away from the exit.

upgrades.name: Ball Lightning
upgrades.description: Able to perceive Camo Bloons. Creates powerful balls of lightning that can freeze Bloons. Additional lightning bolts arc off main attack to nearby Bloons.

upgrades.name: Monarch of Storms
upgrades.description: Calls forth a relentless barrage of superstorms. Blasts all Bloon types for massive damage and blows them away from the exit.

upgrades.name: Thorn Swarm
upgrades.description: Shoots 8 thorns per shot instead of 5.

upgrades.name: Heart of Oak
upgrades.description: Attacks convert Regrow Bloons into normal Bloons. Gains 1% pierce for every life gained from the starting value after the upgrade. Maxes at 100% and diminishes if lives are lost.

upgrades.name: Druid of the Jungle
upgrades.description: Calls a vine from the ground to entangle and crush Bloons one at a time, leaving behind a deadly thorn pile.

upgrades.name: Jungle's Bounty
upgrades.description: Vines create stronger thorn piles. Druid generates cash and lives at the end of each round, plus extra cash per Banana Farm near the Druid. Vine Crush Ability: Vines grab many Bloons at once, following Druid's target priority.

upgrades.name: Spirit of the Forest
upgrades.description: Grows thorned vines along the path that deal constant damage and bonus damage to ceramics. Vines nearest the Spirit of the Forest do more damage. Activated ability grabs more Bloons.

upgrades.name: Druidic Reach
upgrades.description: Increases range by a large amount.

upgrades.name: Heart of Vengeance
upgrades.description: Gains 10% attack speed and 1% for every life lost from the starting value after the upgrade. Maxes at 50% and diminishes if lives are restored.

upgrades.name: Druid of Wrath
upgrades.description: Gains attack speed during the round as long as the Druid is attacking Bloons.

upgrades.name: Poplust
upgrades.description: Boosts attack speed and pierce for other Druids in the radius. Can stack up to 5 times on any single Druid.

upgrades.name: Avatar of Wrath
upgrades.description: The more Bloons there are, the more damage it does!
